text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I've borrowed the student council room today to meet with Satono
Diamond and her parents, representatives of the Satono Group.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Father, Mother, please meet my trainer! There's nobody with a better
eye for racers. If you could just give your permission...

text_block_list.name: Dia's Father
text_block_list.text:
I respect your enthusiasm, but we can't approve of someone we don't
know anything about.

text_block_list.name: Dia's Father
text_block_list.text:
Your trainer will need to take a test... No, I suppose you'll be taking it
together.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
As such, Satono, Trainer, I shall be your examiner. You'll be racing me
one month from now, so show me what you're capable of.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Huh?! You're testing us, McQueen?! That's quite the tall order... But why is it you?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
It's quite simple really. I just couldn't say no to a request from your
mother. The distance will be the same as the Japanese Derby—2,400
meters.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
That distance won't simply test your accelerating abilities, but your
stamina and pacing too. I hope you two will convince me that you're
the perfect team.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I'm sorry. When I asked you to be my trainer, I didn't think it'd turn
out like this...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Um, are you having second thoughts? Challenging McQueen with me
won't be easy...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
She's an amazing runner, and there are so many variables in a
2,400-meter race. It won't be easy to gain her approval.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: But I know we can do it! When you watched my running, you saw me, not my family or status. I can't reach my full potential without you!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Please! Will you share your strength—and future—with me? We'll show
everyone what we can do, so...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: You... really don't mind?
choice_data_list: Yeah. Let's aim for the top together.
Yeah. Let's aim for the top together.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Our goal is clear—have Satono Diamond win a G1 and shine at the
top of the Twinkle Series. But for our first step, we'll have to pass her
family's test.

text_block_list.name: Dia & Kitasan
text_block_list.text:
Yaaaaaahhh!
Haaaaaahhh!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
When Satono Diamond and I looked for a training partner, a certain
close friend of hers leaped at the chance.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Huff... huff... huff... huff... Let's go one more, Kita! Please!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
This isn't enough—not at all! I'll need more than just a burst of
acceleration to keep up with McQueen over 2,400 meters!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Dia... You're so intense... A-all right. Let's go again!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Got it, Trainer! Keep watching me! Learn all you can, and tell me how
to improve!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I want to be a diamond. I want to shine so brilliantly that I burn our
family name into history... and make my parents proud!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Huff... huff... cough, cough! Huff...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Dia... that was incredible. I mean that. Endurance is my forte, but you
kept up through the whole training routine.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
But Trainer, we need to stop. This is too much for someone who hasn't
even debuted yet.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
We were meant to debut together, but I skipped ahead because my
body became race-ready faster. She still can't push as hard as I can.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I can... I can keep going, Trainer! I haven't hit my limit yet—I'm just
being weak!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I won't be a match for McQueen unless I do more, right? Winning as I
am now would be a pipe dream, right?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Be honest with me. At this rate, will I stand a chance?
choice_data_list: Honestly? It... wouldn't even be close.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: I knew it...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm her partner, so I can't lie to her. I explain her chances calmly and
objectively.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro McQueen is one of Tracen Academy's best stayers. Meeting
her standards in a 2,400-meter race will be far from easy at
Diamond's current level.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I... I want to do this with you, Trainer. I want to take on the Twinkle
Series together.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
If we can't overcome this test together, my dream—the Satono
family's dream—will remain out of reach. The very dream I was born to
achieve...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
So please! I can take it! Push me as far as it takes to gain McQueen's
approval!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
You can't keep going, Dia! You'll hurt yourself!
Trainer, stop her!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Their pleas vie for my attention. This one decision could determine
Dia's fate as a runner.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I need to ground myself. What's our first priority? Why did she offer
me her hand in the first place?
choice_data_list: Satono Diamond. We need to talk.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's been a number of days since my fateful decision. The test is finally
upon us.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
...!
Satono, you're... you're covered in dirt. Are you certain you're fit to
run?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I see you're too focused to hear me. Very well, so long as you're in
running condition.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Use this race to show me how far you've come. Naturally, I won't hold
back.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: (I've done everything I can—everything I must. All that's left...)

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: (...Is to show McQueen what I can do!)
